articles.title: HP fined 1.4 billion rupees for “cartelization” of ink cartridges, toner, PCs
articles.content: Resellers threatened to ditch HP printing supplies for counterfeits.
articles.titleZh: 惠普因墨盒、碳粉、个人电脑的“卡特尔化”被罚款14亿卢比
articles.contentZh: 经销商威胁要放弃惠普打印用品的假冒产品。

articles.title: Now, even Russia's most elite hackers are using Clickfix to infect devices
articles.content: The social-engineering technique has primarily been a tool of financially motivated criminals.
articles.titleZh: 现在，即使是俄罗斯最精英的黑客也在使用Clickfix来感染设备
articles.contentZh: 社交工程技术主要是出于经济动机的犯罪分子的工具。

articles.title: Energy IPOs surge as investors hunt for ways to play AI boom
articles.content: Companies coming to market are raising money at fastest pace this century.
articles.titleZh: 随着投资者寻找发挥人工智能热潮的方式，能源IPO激增
articles.contentZh: 本世纪进入市场的公司正在以最快的速度筹集资金。

articles.title: Sheetz is quitting VMware, migrating 11,000 virtual machines
articles.content: The convenience store chain will use StorMagic instead.

articles.title: Here are the 30,000 songs Sony is suing Udio’s AI music generator over
articles.content: Sony Music Entertainment has filed another lawsuit against Udio, accusing the AI music generator of infringing the copyright of more than 30,000 of its songs, ranging from Elvis Presley's Hound Dog to Beyoncé's Say My Name, and Harry Styles' As It Was. The lawsuit, filed in a New York court on Monday, claims that this […]
articles.titleZh: 以下是索尼起诉Udio的AI音乐生成器的3万首歌曲
articles.contentZh: 索尼音乐娱乐公司（ Sony Music Entertainment ）对Udio提起了另一起诉讼，指控这家AI音乐制作公司侵犯了其3万多首歌曲的版权，这些歌曲包括猫王（ Elvis Presley ）的《猎犬》（ Hound Dog ）、碧昂丝（ Beyoncé ）的《说出我的名字》（ Say My Name ）和哈里·斯泰尔斯（ Harry Styles ）的《这起诉讼于周一在纽约法院提起，声称这[…]

articles.title: The FCC is planning to retroactively ban disguised DJI gadgets
articles.content: Last October, we told you how the FCC had given itself the power to retroactively ban gadgets that have already received its approval to be imported and sold in the United States. Now, the FCC's getting ready to wield that power for the first time, by cracking down on the "DJI front companies" suspected of […]
articles.titleZh: 美国联邦通信委员会计划追溯禁止伪装的大疆小工具
articles.contentZh: 去年10月，我们向您介绍了FCC是如何授权追溯禁止已获准在美国进口和销售的小工具的。现在，美国联邦通信委员会准备首次行使这一权力，打击涉嫌[…]的“大疆幌子公司”。
